title: 5 habits a godly man builds before 8 AM
caption:
Your morning already has a master.

Most men don't decide who that is — they just reach for their phone and let it decide for them. Notifications, the feed, someone else's highlight reel before their feet hit the floor.

What a man of God does instead: he shows up to the day before the day shows up to him. The Word before the feed. Prayer that's actually honest — not 'bless this day,' but naming what's really on him. A body asked to work before the world asks anything else. The weight named so it doesn't run the agenda. One hour that belongs to him and God before it belongs to anyone else.

"No one can serve two masters." — Matthew 6:24. That verse isn't just about money.

Own the morning. The rest of the day follows from it.

—

Comment "morning" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #disciplineequalsfreedom #masculinity #morningroutine #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
